text: The world around me seems to repeat itself, almost as if caught in an endless loop—'and and and and...' echoing like a mantra. As I stand in this spacious, modern hallway, the glass revealing a room filled with creative curiosity, I feel both anticipation and a strange calm. Something is being built, something is being discovered. Each 'and' feels like a step forward, the unfinished sentence of innovation. It is both daunting and exhilarating—and I am present at the very edge of what comes next.
